description: Managed by Flora Factory — autonomous development engine

tasks.title: Audit project structure and document architecture
tasks.description: Read all key files (package.json files, tsconfig, next.config, pyproject.toml, app/ directory in API) and write a ARCHITECTURE.md at the project root summarizing: tech stack, monorepo layout, how web and api connect, key packages. This document will guide all future tasks.

tasks.title: Add shared TypeScript types for core domain models
tasks.description: Read the existing packages/types package. Define TypeScript interfaces for the core domain entities visible in the project (e.g. User, any data models you find referenced in apps/web/src). Export them cleanly from packages/types/src/index.ts.
acceptance_criteria: At minimum: User type with id, email, createdAt

tasks.title: Set up shared UI component library baseline
tasks.description: Read packages/ui. Ensure it has: Button, Input, Card components exported from packages/ui/src/index.ts. Each should accept standard HTML props plus a variant prop. Use Tailwind classes. Match the style conventions in apps/web.
acceptance_criteria: Input component with label and error props
Card component with title and children

tasks.title: Implement health check endpoints in web and API
tasks.description: Add a /api/health route to apps/web (Next.js route handler at app/api/health/route.ts) returning {status:'ok',ts:Date}. Read apps/api to find the FastAPI app entry point and add a /health GET endpoint there too.

tasks.title: Add environment variable validation at startup
tasks.description: For apps/web: create src/env.ts using zod to validate required env vars (NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL minimum). Import and run it in next.config.ts. For apps/api: validate required vars (DATABASE_URL, SECRET_KEY minimum) at startup with a clear error message if missing.
acceptance_criteria: apps/web/src/env.ts validates env vars with zod
Missing env var crashes startup with clear message
API validates its required env vars at startup
No runtime surprises from missing config
